授業目的: 本科目は、シェイクスピア劇翻訳研究の分野に関連するトピックを探求する。
到達目標: 履修者は、シェイクスピア劇の翻訳を評価したり、その歴史的背景も理解するために役立つ知識と研究方法を身につける。
授業方法:
Reading and discussion in English with an emphasis
on critical reflection.

第1回:
【Startup Week】
Face-to-face class
《90 minutes》
Course introduction: Shakespeare translation studies continued
第2回:
【Core Weeks ①】
Face-to-face class
《90 minutes》
Translation and genre (1): translating poetry
第3回:
【Core Weeks ②】
Face-to-face class
《90 minutes》
Translation and genre (2): translating Basho
第4回:
【Core Weeks ③】
Face-to-face class
《90 minutes》
Translation and genre (3): translating drama
第5回:
【Core Weeks ④】
Face-to-face class
《90 minutes》
Translation and genre (4): translating Chikamatsu
第6回:
【Core Weeks ⑤】
Face-to-face class
《90 minutes》
Presenting translation research (1): resources and methodology
第7回:
【Core Weeks ⑥】
Face-to-face class
《90 minutes》
Presenting translation research (2): model article (1) literary translation
第8回:
【Core Weeks ⑦】
Face-to-face class
《90 minutes》
Presenting translation research (3): model article (2) Shakespeare translation
第9回:
【Core Weeks ⑧】
Face-to-face class
《90 minutes》
Presenting translation research (4): conference presentations
第10回:
【Flex Hours】
Face-to-face class
《90 minutes》
Mid-term review: course project (2)
第11回:
【Core Weeks ⑨】
Face-to-face class
《90 minutes》
Loose ends (1): translation criticism
第12回:
【Core Weeks ⑩】
Face-to-face class
《90 minutes》
Loose ends (2): untranslatability
第13回:
【Core Weeks ⑪】
Face-to-face class
《90 minutes》
Loose ends (3): translation studies and comparative literature
第14回:
【Core Weeks ⑫】
Face-to-face class
《90 minutes》
Closing: teaching translation studies
第15回:
【Flex Hours】
Online class (Simultaneous two-way format)
《90 minutes》
Extra lesson (as required)
トピック.授業外学習2: Students are expected to prepare weekly readings ahead of class, and to plan and research their final essay to a high academic standard.
